Use Category Specific Use Type B1 B2 B3
P = Permitted by Right; S = Special Use; — = Not Permitted; PD = Planned Development only
A. Commercial Uses
Day Care Center S P P
Food Production, Artisan S S P
Live-Work Unit — S P
Hair Salon / Barbershop P P P
